actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon makes three attacks: one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) Piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) Lightning damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Lightning Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: The dragon exhales lightning in a 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) Lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

tactical_info.environment: Desert lairs, coastal cliffs, underground complexes
tactical_info.tactics: Opens with lightning breath, uses multiattack in melee, burrows to control battlefield positioning
tactical_info.weaknesses: Arrogant, vulnerable to coordinated ranged attacks
